name: burnrate-video
description: Remotion project — animated brand cards for the Burnrate demo video

scripts.render: npm run render:cold && npm run render:intro && npm run render:cards && npm run render:outro
scripts.render:cards: remotion render Card01 out/card01.mp4 && remotion render Card02 out/card02.mp4 && remotion render Card03 out/card03.mp4 && remotion render Card04 out/card04.mp4 && remotion render Card05 out/card05.mp4
